David Wells

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Left  •  Throws: Left

6-3, 187lb (190cm, 84kg)

Born: May 20, 1963 in Torrance, CA us

Draft: Drafted by the Toronto Blue Jays in the 2nd round of the 1982 MLB June Amateur Draft from Point Loma HS (San Diego, CA).

High School: Point Loma HS (San Diego, CA)

Debut: June 30, 1987 (Age 24-041d, 15,349th in major league history)
   vs. NYY 4.0 IP, 9 H, 4 SO, 2 BB, 4 ER, L

Last Game: September 28, 2007 (Age 44-131d)
   vs. SFG 6.0 IP, 7 H, 3 SO, 1 BB, 2 ER, W

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1988 season

Agents: Gregg Clifton, Nina Wells • Previously: Gregg Clifton

Full Name: David Lee Wells

Nicknames: Boomer

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

View Player Bio from the SABR BioProject

  • 3x All-Star
  • 2x World Series
  • ALCS MVP

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is David Wells?

David Wells is 62 years old.

When was David Wells born?

David Wells was born on May 20, 1963.

Where was David Wells born?

David Wells was born in Torrance, CA.

How tall is David Wells?

David Wells is 6-3 (190 cm) tall.

How much did David Wells weigh when playing?

David Wells weighed 187 lbs (84 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did David Wells play?

David Wells played 21 seasons.

Is David Wells in the Hall of Fame?

David Wells has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was David Wells drafted?

David Wells was drafted by the Toronto Blue Jays in the 2nd round of the 1982 MLB June Amateur Draft from Point Loma HS (San Diego, CA).

What position did David Wells play?

David Wells was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did David Wells have?

David Wells had 2,201 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has David Wells played for?

David Wells played for 9 teams; the Baltimore Orioles, Boston Red Sox, Chicago White Sox, Cincinnati Reds, Detroit Tigers, Los Angeles Dodgers, New York Yankees, San Diego Padres and Toronto Blue Jays.

How many World Series has David Wells won?

David Wells has won 2 World Series.

When did David Wells retire?

David Wells last played in 2007.

What are David Wells' nicknames?

Boomer is a nickname for David Wells.
